programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful 23-year-old girl was driving home after a rock concert when her tyre blew out. Investigators found her car, but no trace of her. At first there were hundreds of leads, but after three years, the trail turned cold. Police got a break when someone called to report a suspicious truck in a neighbour's driveway; something inside that truck was plugged into an electrical outlet, allowing the device to run 24 hours-a-day, 365-days-a-year. Suddenly, the cold trail turned even colder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. She was a promising young dancer, whose ability landed her a spot in Houston's prestigious High School for Performing Arts. Unfortunately, while there, Tracy Jo became involved with the wrong crowd, and began experimenting with drugs. When she disappeared without a trace, her family immediately suspected her new friends, some of whom were members of the Aryian Brotherhood.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It looked like 62-year-old Phillip Rouss, Jr had it all: family, friends, and a new business which was the culmination of a lifelong dream. Then his health began to deteriorate. Doctors couldn't pinpoint the cause of the illness and Phil began to suspect his condition was no accident. Toxicologists and investigators identified the real problem just in time to save Phil's life.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When six-year-old Michelle Door disappeared without a trace, her father, Carl, became the prime suspect. Carl failed a polygraph test, and even confessed to the murder of his daughter. But the confession was rooted in exhaustion, guilt, and mental illness, and was later discounted. Years later, police learned that a man who had been convicted of another murder lived just two doors away from Michelle at the time of her disappearance. This discovery, and tiny drops of blood shed a decade earlier, enabled police to solve the crime.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: Following police detectives around the clock, each investigation plays out against the time pressure of only being able to hold a suspect for 24 hours.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: Lieutenant Joe Kenda and his Colorado Springs crime-fighting team have solved an unprecedented 387 homicide investigations, resulting in a 92% solve rate. Each episode of Homicide Hunter will use Kenda's first person narrative along with dramatic re-creations to retell the stories of Kenda's most disturbing and challenging murder cases. Homicide Hunters takes viewers behind the scenes with one of the world's best homicide detectives to learn how murders are solved. Neighbours are aghast when beloved nurse Ernestine Addison and her teenage son Bobby are gunned down in cold blood. Evidence at the scene suggests a crime of passion, and a young tipster points Lt. Joe Kenda towards a large shadowy figure spotted fleeing the scene. Kenda begins to piece together clues about the mystery man's identity, and initiates a city-wide manhunt to track him down. But the case heats up when he receives word that the killer's murderous rampage isn't over just yet.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Under pressure to land a suspect in the Dora Lange murder, Quesada warns Hart and Cohle they might be replaced by three detectives from a new occult-crimes task force. The pair lobbies for extra time in order to follow up on a lead that takes them from a rural cathouse to an incinerated church. With his marriage to Maggie already strained by work, Hart ends up finding respite outside of home.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: A hidden image at the burned-out church leads Cohle and Hart to Joel Theriot, a tent-revival minister whose parishioners finger a scarred "tall man" seen with Dora Lange. Brought in for interrogation, a sex offender matching the description is quickly dismissed by Cohle, despite offering a confession. Hart gets side tracked after Maggie sets Cohle up with a friend at a C&W bar. Looking to establish a pattern of murder, Cohle pores over old case files, finding a connection with a woman assumed to have drowned years earlier.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Hart and Cohle hunt for their newly identified suspect, Reggie Ledoux, a meth cooker who shared a cell with Dora Lange's husband and recently skipped parole. As Hart's personal life collapses around him, Cohle immerses himself in an old criminal identity from his narco days, contacting an East-Texas biker gang known to deal with their primary suspect.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.sub-title: The Secret Fate Of All Life
programme.desc: A violent denouement in the forest clears the Dora Lange case and turns Cohle and Hart into local heroes. Each man settles into a healthier rhythm of living as Hart returns to his family, and Cohle starts a relationship while gaining a reputation as a closer in interrogations. As time passes and his daughters grow older, Hart faces new tensions and temptations, and Cohle learns from a double-murder suspect that there could be much more to an old case than he'd once thought.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In 2002, Cohle and Hart begin to fall back to familiar and violent obsessions. Hart exacts savage vengeance on a pair of teenage boys, and Cohle becomes convinced they left something undone in 1995. Working on his own, Cohle traces a sinister connection between missing children along the coast and evangelist Billy Lee Tuttle's Wellsprings Program.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: After Marty is shown a harrowing piece of evidence, he and Cohle forge a truce after years of vitriol, and we learn why Cohle returned to the state in 2010. Hart helps Cohle probe a murky conspiracy of disappearances connected to the Dora Lange murder, a path of connections that leads to the Tuttle family. Hart reconnects with Maggie after years without communication in order to confirm what the police wanted, and perhaps to say goodbye. Concerned that harm might come to him, Maggie pays Cohle a visit at the bar where he's working, but gets a cold shoulder for her efforts. Cohle and Hart uncover a connection to an old colleague and enact a plan to draw him out.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: After their interrogation of Geraci yields new info but no critical breaks, Hart and Cohle find themselves back at square one. However, a seemingly arbitrary detail in a photograph, along with a homeowner's old tax records, provides the pair with a vital new lead in their 17-year-old case. The two men pursue the lead to an apocalyptic confrontation.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.sub-title: The Western Book Of The Dead
programme.desc: The disappearance of a city manager disrupts a lucrative land scheme and ignites an investigation involving three police officers and a career criminal who is moving into legitimate business.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Ray and Ani investigate a victim's depraved background, as does Frank, while Paul probes the Vinci PD.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Paul works the prostitute angle while Frank receives the first casualty in a secret war, and steps back into a world he'd left behind.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: The detail works a pawn-shop lead to close in on a suspect in the Caspere case. Meanwhile, Frank revisits his past to pay for his present.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Ray and Frank contemplate new life choices while Ani and Paul follow a lead up the coast.

programme.desc: Desperate to locate a missing woman with intel about Caspere, Frank meets with Mexican drug dealers while Ani infiltrates an exclusive inner circle, with Ray and Paul keeping close tabs.

programme.title: True Detective

programme.title: True Detective
programme.sub-title: The Great War And Modern Memory
programme.desc: The disappearance of a young Arkansas boy and his sister in 1980 triggers vivid memories and enduring questions for retired detective Wayne Hays, who worked the case 35 years ago with his then partner Roland West. What started as a routine case becomes a long journey to dissect the crime and make sense of it.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Hays looks back at the aftermath of the 1980 Purcell case in West Finger, AR, including possible evidence left behind at the Devil's Den, an outdoor hangout for local kids. As attention focuses on two conspicuous suspects; Brett Woodard, a solitary vet and trash collector, and Ted LaGrange, an ex-con with a penchant for children, the parents of the missing kids, Tom and Lucy Purcell, receive a cryptic note from an anonymous source.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Hays recalls his early romance with Amelia, as well as some cracks in their relationship that surfaced after they married and had children. Ten years after the Purcell crimes took place, new evidence emerges, giving Hays a second chance to vindicate himself and the investigation.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Hays and West see a possible connection between the local church and the Purcell crimes. As the detectives search for one suspect and round up another one for interrogation, Woodard finds himself targeted by a vigilante group.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Wayne finds himself in a no-win situation as new clues emerge in the Purcell case. Roland wrestles with how to keep evidence secure as lawyers demand a new investigation. Amelia finds her relationship with Wayne imperiled by her writing aspirations and his jealousy.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Wayne and Roland revisit discrepancies in the Purcell case that have been hidden or forgotten over the years. Among those being reevaluated is Tom Purcell, as well as Lucy Purcell's cousin Dan O'Brien. The glitter of Amelia's book release is tarnished by a voice from the past.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Following up on new leads, Wayne and Roland track down a man who left the police force in the midst of the Purcell investigation. Meanwhile, Amelia visits Lucy Purcell's best friend in hopes of gaining insights into the whereabouts of the mysterious one-eyed man.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: Wayne struggles to hold on to his memories, and his grip on reality, as the truth behind the Purcell case is finally revealed.

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In Ennis, Alaska, the men who operate a research station vanish. To solve the case, Detectives Danvers and Navarro must confront the darkness themselves, and dig into the haunted truths that lie buried.

programme.desc: As Danvers and Prior set out to learn more about Tsalal and find an unlikely location for the physical evidence, Captain Connelly threatens to move the case to Anchorage.

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: April 26, 1986, Ukrainian SSR. Plant workers and firefighters put their lives on the line to control a catastrophic explosion at a Soviet nuclear power plant.

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: With untold millions at risk after the Chernobyl explosion, nuclear physicist Ulana Khomyuk makes a desperate attempt to reach Valery Legasov, a leading Soviet nuclear physicist, and warn him about the threat of second explosion that could devastate the continent.

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: Lyudmilla Ignatenko, a Pripyat resident, ignores warnings about her firefighter husband's contamination; Valery Legasov lays out a decontamination plan, complete with human risks.

programme.title: Chernobyl
programme.desc: Valery Legasov and Soviet Deputy Prime Minister Boris Shcherbina consider using lunar rovers to remove radioactive debris, while Ulana Khomyuk faces government hurdles in determining the truth about the cause of the explosion.

programme.title: Fashion from Italy
programme.desc: Check in for the recent updates of the famous Italian look - iconic casual aristocratic elegance in all its modern versions created by the world-famous and emerging Italian designers.

programme.title: Magimix Culinary Innovation
programme.desc: Built to last, reflecting the philosophy of quality products that stand the test of time. Magimix brings creativity to your kitchen, accomplishing demanding tasks quickly, easily, and quietly.

programme.title: Fitness With Fiona Summers
programme.desc: Discover the safe and effective way to get in shape with Fiona Summers' fitness program. Developed by a busy mum of 5 kids, now enjoyed by over 5 million worldwide.

programme.title: Carla Oates The Beauty Chef
programme.desc: Watch Carla in the kitchen whipping up certified organic, naturally fermented superfood blends - a powerhouse of nutrients and healthy bacteria. Beauty begins in the belly for radiant skin.

programme.title: Nina Leonard Fashion
programme.desc: Effortless Style with Nina Leonard. Mix and match chic pieces for work or weekend. Nina Leonard's refined collection offers endless outfit possibilities. Look sharp and confident from today.

programme.title: Rhonda Shear Apparel
programme.desc: Look and feel amazing in Rhonda Shear's collection! Shop stylish and comfortable apparel designed for all body types. With passion and purpose, empowerment is sewn into every stitch.

programme.title: Dazzling Diamonds
programme.desc: Embrace timeless elegance with enduring gems that radiate eternal beauty. Shine like the stars with jewellery that captures everlasting elegance.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.sub-title: This is What a Miracle Feels Like
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: The Gospels
programme.desc: Dave Stotts takes us on his most exciting adventure yet as he tells the story of Jesus from the locations recorded in the Gospels of Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John. Dave travels to over 50 ancient sites in Israel to deliver the Gospels in a fresh and compelling way. As Dave uncovers the evidence for the truth of scripture, he encourages all of us to get excited about reading the Bible again!

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: No Weapon Formed Against You Shall Prosper - Part 2
programme.desc: Jesus came to give us His peace. Today, Joyce continues teaching out of Isaiah 54:17 and shares ways to live a calm and peaceful life.

programme.title: Convocation
programme.desc: Convocation at Liberty University is North America's largest weekly gathering of Christian students, and each year it plays host to more than 80 guest speakers of national significance from every sphere of society. The services, held within the Vines Centre at the University during each semester, connect students with their Creator through passionate worship and powerful messages firmly rooted in Biblical truth.

programme.title: It Takes a Child
programme.desc: Join CJ, a former sponsor child turned Compassion field worker, as he explores a village in Samar, Philippines that has been impacted by child sponsorship. For many families here, poverty has ripped away their options; but Compassion sponsorship is showing a way out. Children don't have to work to buy food anymore. Families don't have to live under the mantle of hopelessness. A village is raising their eyes to the future.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Our foodie friends go diving into dumplings while Allie gets a unique sunset sail on the river.

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: Set on the streets of Melbourne, we explore the devastating issue of homelessness within one of the most liveable cities in the world! After spending a night sleeping it rough, the ladies come together with The National Homeless Collective & an inspiring woman named Lucia to give a young lady who escaped homelessness a fabulous makeover!

programme.title: Owlegories
programme.desc: Owlegories is an animated series that follows a group of student owls as they travel on adventures learning about nature, faith, and God! You can tell a lot about an artist by what he creates. That is the theme behind Owlegories. Owlegories teaches kids about God through the amazing things found in nature and revealed in God's word. The banner verse for Owlegories is Psalm 19:1-4: "The heavens declare the glory of God; the skies proclaim the work of his hands. Day after day they pour forth speech; night after night they reveal knowledge. They have no speech, they use no words; no sound is heard from them. Yet their voice goes out into all the earth, their words to the ends of the world."

programme.title: Superbook
programme.desc: The familiar and the futuristic interact with ancient people, places and events to create a sense of wonder, anticipation, empowerment, and personal breakthrough as the children witness God's interaction with man. Superbook is always an exciting journey, full of discovery - with a transformational outcome. Superbook teaches children timeless moral truths and life lessons through the captivating, Bible-based adventures of two time-traveling children and their robot friend. Play fun Superbook games here: https://us-en.superbook.cbn.com/games.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry. Hear inspiration for change, healing, peace and joy through his affective communication connecting you to God, the church, and the world!

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.sub-title: St Nicholas - St Nick or Santa?
programme.desc: Every year, baby Jesus and Santa dominate all Christmas imagery. But who is this jolly fur-clad mythological figure? In this episode we discover his fascinating 1700 year evolution from a bishop of ancient Turkey to Santa Clause of the North Pole.

programme.title: Dolphin Island
programme.desc: After losing her parents, teenager Annabel Coleridge lives with her fisherman grandfather on a Caribbean island paradise surrounded by an extended family of loving but quirky oddballs and her best friend, a dolphin named Mitzy. Everything changes when her rich maternal grandparents arrive with a shifty lawyer to bring her back to New York. It's up to her grandfather, her friends, Desaray, her new social worker, her charming son, Mateo, and Mitzy to find a way for Anna to stay on the island home she loves so much.

programme.title: North to Home
programme.desc: When life takes a turn, sisters take your hand. Follows Suzanne McBride and her three adopted daughters. This looks like a great time for a family reunion, but the sisters are each wrestling with unique challenges that threaten to derail this special occasion.

programme.title: Planetshakers TV
programme.desc: Planetshakers' mission is to 'empower a generation to win a generation'. This Christian youth movement began as an annual conference in Melbourne that saw thousands of people of different ages, backgrounds and nationalities from all over the globe gather together. The movement grew and grew into an international ministry and church. Russell and Sam Evans are the senior pastors of Planetshakers City Church and Planetshakers TV showcases weekly teaching and music.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Give Jesus Your Cares And Live Stress-Free (Live at Lakewood Church) Pt 2 of 2
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Finding the Light
programme.desc: Lizzie Oakes invites her guests into honest conversations about difficult seasons in their lives and discovers how the light of God's love got them through.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Imagine if the army, the Bride of Christ, truly sought first the Kingdom of God. What if we were led by the heart of God and gave Him 100% of our heart, soul, mind, and strength?E26.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: No Weapon Formed Against You Shall Prosper - Part 2
programme.desc: Jesus came to give us His peace. Today, Joyce continues teaching out of Isaiah 54:17 and shares ways to live a calm and peaceful life.

programme.title: Moms' Night Out
programme.desc: All Allyson and her friends want is a peaceful, grown-up evening of dinner and conversation a long-needed mums' night out. But in order to enjoy high heels, adult conversation and food not served in a paper bag, they need their husbands to watch the kids for three hours. What could go wrong? An endearing true-to-life family comedy that celebrates the beautiful mess called parenting.

programme.title: Percy Vs Goliath
programme.desc: Percy Schmeiser, a third-generation farmer, gets sued by a corporate giant for allegedly using their patented seeds. With little resources to fight a legal battle, Percy joins forces with up-and-coming attorney Jackson Weaver and environmental activist Rebecca Salcau for a monumental case that leads all the way to the Supreme Court.

programme.title: 90 Minutes In Heaven
programme.desc: Based on a true story. Don Piper was in an horrific car crash and without a pulse, was presumed dead. EMT's and police wait for the coroner to pronounce him dead before he can be moved. A man comes along, who feels led to pray for him, and starts to pray while singing praise songs. Don starts singing along and EMT's confirm he now has a pulse. But Don is not happy and fights his recovery. He was on his way to heaven, and now he has been pulled back, with terrible injuries. Is there a purpose to his return to earth?

programme.title: In God's Company: Thomas Cook
programme.desc: There is no name in the world more instantly recognisable in connection with travel than Thomas Cook. A devout Christian, his great passion was to bring people closer together and nearer to their Creator by making "God's earth with all its fullness and beauty" accessible and affordable to all.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Give Jesus Your Cares And Live Stress-Free (Live at Lakewood Church) Pt 2 of 2
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: God Rocks! Playlist
programme.desc: Join kid-hosts Myles and Stella for a fun, non-stop musical playlist of hit songs about Faith and Trust! Bible-based songs and scripture songs make up this God Rocks Playlist, an MTV style music program targeting kids 5-12. The series features high quality, original songs from the award-winning God Rocks! band as well as other musical characters from the God Rocks universe.

programme.title: Hunter & Twerp Scripture Seekers
programme.desc: Welcome to the wonderful world of Brightington, home of Hunter and Twerp, Scripture Seekers! Stacks of fun Bible lessons for children to enjoy. Every episode brings new challenges to overcome and new lessons to learn, such as why do we pray? What/who is the Holy Spirit? Why is the Bible important? How can we recognise the voice of God and avoid nonsense teaching? Challenging and powerful lessons are introduced in the context of wacky comedy adventures that children will love so much, they won't even realise they're learning!

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: Glorious Gospel Church has been meeting the needs of the community since 1990. With a vision for a church that is real, relatable, enjoyable, life-changing and uplifting, they are committed to providing church services that will enable you to experience church this way. Linked by mutual vision and values, which are based firmly in the Bible and what the Bible teaches, GGC's mandate is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a relatable and practical way.

programme.title: Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis travels from Alaska to Argentina relying on the kindness of strangers and surprising unsuspecting good Samaritans with life-changing gifts!

programme.title: Adventures of Dally & Spanky
programme.desc: Addy and Ella are teenaged step-sisters with little in common and not much of a relationship. When 17-year-old Addy loses her father and falls into a depression, the unlikely friendship between the family dog (Dally) and the pony (Spanky) she inherits from her late father brings the two sisters together while leading the way to Addy's emotional recovery. Following her teacher's advice, she takes on a new hobby: training Dally & Spanky for the school's talent show. Unfortunately, Dally & Spanky's success at the high school talent show isn't enough to convince the family to keep Spanky as he's too much of a financial burden. But Addy gets an idea. She submits a video of their routine to a popular TV Talent show. Now, it's all or nothing and ANYTHING can happen.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry. Hear inspiration for change, healing, peace and joy through his affective communication connecting you to God, the church, and the world!

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: No Weapon Formed Against You Shall Prosper - Part 3
programme.desc: Are you actively pursuing the peace of God? Today, Joyce discusses peace, righteousness and the benefits of understanding who you are in Christ.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: The book of Ecclesiastes reminds us that Almighty God is in control of our lives and His plan for us is perfect.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, USA, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for this program of powerful music and empowering preaching. Experience from the weekend church service of Lakewood Church, the largest and fastest growing church in America that is inspiring millions of people around the world!

programme.title: Paul's Promise
programme.desc: Set in the peak of the 1960s Civil Rights movement, Paul's Promise is the inspiring true story of Paul Holderfield, a former racist firefighter who became a pastor, starting one of the first integrated churches in the American South. It's one man's journey to hope and healing during a troubled time in USA history. Paul Holderfield was raised poor and knew what it was like to go to bed hungry. At night he would hear his mother pray for food for her children. In the 1950's, during the Little Rock Central High School crisis, Holderfield is a North Little Rock fireman. He turns his back on a Black man, hoping he will not recognise him, but he does. His childhood best friend Jimmy Lipkin approaches Paul for a handshake, but Holderfield puts his hands in his back pockets and refuses to shake Lipkin's hand. Later convicted by his actions, Holderfield tells his wife Barbara that he will never again treat a human being that way. Ultimately he makes a decision to serve God and stand up to injustice. His story is one that continues to make a huge impact on the community to this day.

programme.title: The Good Neighbour
programme.desc: The Good Neighbour is a docuseries that gives a voice to the real stories of people living in poverty and explores the complexity of poverty and its devastating effects on the lives of vulnerable children. Take a look at Compassion's holistic approach to development and dive into what the Bible says about poverty. The docuseries uncovers what it truly means for us to be a good neighbour to those who need our compassion the most.

programme.title: Solomon's Porch
programme.desc: Solomon's Porch is a series about a small town-square Christian bookstore on Main Street America. The store is run by Mary Hendricks, an older woman with a secretive past.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.desc: In every VeggieTales video, Larry the Cucumber sings one of his special "Silly Songs with Larry". This video contains many of the most popular Silly Songs, hosted by The Pirates Who Don't Do Anything (who debut a Silly Song of their own).

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: Connect follows a plucky school theatre group that aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids are pretty sure they have a clear understanding of everything that happens in 'God's Big Story'. Well most of it. They do have a few questions, concerns, and outright misconceptions. Fortunately, an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures. And yes, there is a talking sock.

programme.title: Arise Kids TV
programme.desc: Join the ARISE Kids TV team in the final week of our series - Limitless! We believe that Gods desire for our lives is that we would love limitless, limitless God, Limitless life! This week we wrap up our series with this best bits episode! You don't want to miss it!

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Hosted by historian and filmmaker Dave Stotts, Drive Thru History: Ends of the Earth takes viewers on a 19-episode, global trek to every corner of the earth, to show how God has used ordinary people throughout history to take His saving grace to every nation and people.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: The Empire State strikes back with an all out pizza vs pizza extravaganza. From old classics to wild combinations, Allie & Kels try all the pizza NYC has to offer.

programme.title: Live + Local
programme.sub-title: There's a New PD in Town
programme.desc: Dave Coulier, (Uncle Joey on iconic 90s TV show Full House) is Tommy Murphy, a cankerous and curmudgeonly but big hearted veteran radio DJ. His morning show co-host is Tina, played by Emily Penderganst. Known as 'TnT', they are the stars of Christian radio station K-HUGG and LIVE + LOCAL follows along with all the day to day antics of their radio show. Each week also showcases a real life celebrity guest interview.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil
programme.desc: Avery (Chabert), Emma (Reeser) and Tracy (Sweeney) are three close, but far-flung college friends who reunite in different cities every year to go antiquing. During a visit to San Francisco, they discover an extraordinary, antique lace wedding veil with a legend - it is said that whoever possesses the veil will find their true love. The friends agree to purchase the veil together and pass it along to each other to test whether or not the legend is true.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: God desires to bless His people. Throughout the Bible, we see again and again His intention to lead His followers into shalom, a perfect, God-centered peace. In his message The Blessing, Pastor Harrison Conley takes an in-depth look at a piece of Scripture known as the Blessing, and shares how you can experience the protection, rest, and peace God offers everyone who follows Jesus Christ. Learn how you can embrace all God has for you in this encouraging message!

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Answers For A Distracted World Pt 1 of 3
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: The best-known Christian evangelist of the 20th century, Billy Graham gained world attention in 1949 with a tent revival in downtown Los Angeles that was scheduled for three weeks and lasted six. In the ensuing 55 years and more, 'Billy Graham Crusades' consistently drew audiences of thousands to arenas and stadiums throughout the world.'Classic Crusades' presents the best of the last 35 years of Billy Graham that brought the message of salvation through Jesus Christ to the world. World renowned actors, singers, athletes and ministers share the platform with Dr. Graham. Also often features the famous sounds of the Billy Graham Choir, George Beverly Shea and Cliff Barrows for an hour of blessing and inspiration to all who watch.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: An inspirational program with principles for living, and life stories from everyday New Zealanders. Collated with a fresh and dynamic edge, Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles both from the platform, and on location. Impact for Life equips people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: No Weapon Formed Against You Shall Prosper - Part 3
programme.desc: Are you actively pursuing the peace of God? Today, Joyce discusses peace, righteousness and the benefits of understanding who you are in Christ.

programme.title: Finding the Light
programme.desc: Lizzie Oakes invites her guests into honest conversations about difficult seasons in their lives and discovers how the light of God's love got them through.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil
programme.desc: Avery (Chabert), Emma (Reeser) and Tracy (Sweeney) are three close, but far-flung college friends who reunite in different cities every year to go antiquing. During a visit to San Francisco, they discover an extraordinary, antique lace wedding veil with a legend - it is said that whoever possesses the veil will find their true love. The friends agree to purchase the veil together and pass it along to each other to test whether or not the legend is true.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Many of the world's poorest children live in counties affected by conflict. Often poverty fuels war, creating more poverty and the success of the next generation is gravely threatened. Compassion International exists as an advocacy organisation to release children from poverty in Jesus' name. Dr. Victor Maniraguha was one such child. He comes from Rwanda, where in 1994 100 days of war and genocide shocked the world. But now a new story of radical healing and transformation is being written in the pages of history. The authors are the young men and women of Rwanda like Dr. Victor, who see hope in their future.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: Glorious Gospel Church has been meeting the needs of the community since 1990. With a vision for a church that is REAL, RELATABLE, ENJOYABLE, LIFE-CHANGING & UPLIFTING, they are committed to providing church services that will enable you to experience church this way. Linked by mutual vision and values, which are based firmly in the Bible and what the Bible teaches, GGC's mandate is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a relatable and practical way..

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: The book of Ecclesiastes reminds us that Almighty God is in control of our lives and His plan for us is perfect.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. Bruce and his team will move, inspire and challenge you to live your life to the absolute fullest. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Bruce travels Australia speaking regularly about his experiences in life and in the Church in a way that is both relatable and easy to understand. Bruce's message of power, impact, freedom and purpose is for anyone and everyone - for no matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: Atheism cannot account for love. Without God, there can be no love.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Friends and Heroes is an animated children's adventure based in Ancient Egypt, Israel and Rome. The story follows two young friends Macky and Portia as they fight for justice against the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Whirl
programme.desc: Whirl is a Bible-based cartoon series about the loveable, sometimes overly-enthusiastic kids of First Second Church. In each episode, the kids tackle a different theme that is central to Christian values. Everything from generosity and forgiveness to doubt and the trinity are explored over the course of the series. And while the issues dealt with in each episode are relatable, the solutions this kooky cast often find are a bit unconventional. Whether the kids of First Second Church are searching for a hidden sanctum of the church's altar guild, or trying to outsmart robots bent on world domination, these characters will keep the whole family laughing and learning.

programme.title: God Rocks! Playlist
programme.desc: Join kid-hosts Myles and Stella for a fun, non-stop musical playlist of hit songs about Faith and Trust! Bible-based songs and scripture songs make up this God Rocks Playlist, an MTV style music program targeting kids 5-12. The series features high quality, original songs from the award-winning God Rocks! band as well as other musical characters from the God Rocks universe.

How can we recognise the voice of God and avoid nonsense teaching? Challenging and powerful lessons are introduced in the context of wacky comedy adventures that children will love so much, they won't even realise they're learning!

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: Holy Moly turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. Eyes will be fixed on the screen, observing how God is at work in the story when colour is introduced to an otherwise black-and-white world. Rather than dialogue, the series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions to help audiences of any language or background immediately relate to and remember these enriching stories.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: Connect follows a plucky school theatre group that aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids are pretty sure they have a clear understanding of everything that happens in 'God's Big Story'. Well most of it. They do have a few questions, concerns, and outright misconceptions. Fortunately, an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures. And yes, there is a talking sock.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in 3 minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome. It's the Blello Show! Let's go!

programme.title: Arise Kids TV
programme.desc: Join the ARISE Kids TV team in the final week of our series - Limitless! We believe that Gods desire for our lives is that we would love limitless, limitless God, Limitless life! This week we wrap up our series with this best bits episode! You don't want to miss it!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is an animated action-adventure series about a young spy with a whole lot to learn! He's arrogant and reckless and always insists on working alone. That is, until the day he's paired with a very unlikely partner his mum! Deb Defrates is not a spy. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom and kindness somehow always seem to save the day.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Holy Rollin'
programme.desc: Nick and Yvette Wynne take on the gruelling journey of riding around Australia on their matching 1200 Ducati motorbikes. Get a feel for the rugged sunburnt countryside and the people of the outback as these two motorcycle missionaries traverse 20 000 km in 3 months over 12 episodes.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: Allie & Kels get cheesy with a very dairy loaded episode.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Welcome to Hope
programme.desc: John gets his life back on track thanks to Jude and Pastor Luke, until an unthinkable family tragedy occurs.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Over 1 million Australians are currently battling a form of eating disorder. Eating disorders can take control of an individual's life and have a devastating effect, if left untreated. In this episode we hear first hand from guest Angie Cahill how eating disorders can develop and the journey to recovery.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil
programme.desc: Avery (Chabert), Emma (Reeser) and Tracy (Sweeney) are three close, but far-flung college friends who reunite in different cities every year to go antiquing. During a visit to San Francisco, they discover an extraordinary, antique lace wedding veil with a legend - it is said that whoever possesses the veil will find their true love. The friends agree to purchase the veil together and pass it along to each other to test whether or not the legend is true.

programme.title: A Royal Surprise
programme.desc: When Riley's boyfriend, Mandla, invites her to South Africa to meet his family, she is shocked to discover that he is a prince. The news puts Riley's trust in Mandla in jeopardy, and he must do what he can to win her love back.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham (The Waifs), Anna Weatherup (The Voice 2013) and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California who toured in Australia in 2012.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.sub-title: God Sees and Blesses the Small Stuff
programme.desc: Since 1970 the Hour of Power has been reaching viewers from around the world. Originally founded by Dr Robert H Schuller, the program became the most-watched religious program in the world, reaching 17 million viewers. Now under the leadership of Bobby Schuller, Dr Schuller's grandson. The congregation worships at Shepherd's Grove Church in Garden Grove, CA. The program aims to provide spiritual principles and practices that can help people, as they become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning. To learn more about who they are in Christ through the process of formation, to belong to his family of believers and become a part of the community and to heal as they are loved and then love and help heal others through mission. Jesus Christ ushered in the Kingdom of God into our world through His death and resurrection. He invites everyone to be a part of this amazing movement by trusting and following Him. There is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, USA; join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for this program of powerful music and empowering preaching. Experience from the weekend church service of Lakewood Church, the largest and fastest growing church in America that is inspiring millions of people around the world!

programme.title: Give Me an Answer
programme.desc: Give Me an Answer exists to answer life's most difficult questions. The shows are recorded on college campus across the United States where Cliffe Knechtle engages with skeptical students and professors, to give real answers to the tough questions about Christianity.

programme.title: The Girl Who Believes in Miracles
programme.desc: Unlike most people, young Sara Hopkins is willing to take God at His Word. So when she hears a preacher say that faith can move mountains, she starts praying. What begins with a mysteriously-healed bird leads to people suddenly cured of their misery and misfortune all over town. But the overwhelming crush of notoriety and media attention soon takes its toll on Sara. Will her family be able to save their miracle girl before it's too late?

programme.title: Caribbean Summer
programme.desc: After an embarrassing event during a live broadcast, Jade is forced to take a vacation, but her trip gets off to a rocky start when she fall's victim to a rental scam. Serendipitously, she befriends the real owner, Ford, and discovers fun and romance.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: The book of Ecclesiastes reminds us that Almighty God is in control of our lives and His plan for us is perfect.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: A Marriage Made in Heaven
programme.desc: Demetri Chicopoulos (Robert Krantz) is living a charmed life. He is the host of his hit, daytime talk show, Daytime with Demetri. However, we soon learn that with a recent divorce and the passing of his mother, Demetri's life is more pain than charmed. In a prayerful moment, Demetri kneels and asks God if he could just relive one week of his life. He knows things would turn out differently. Demetri rises and suddenly meets his Guardian Angel (Tom Arnold). Well, not exactly the type of Guardian Angel one hopes for. The Guardian Angel tells Demetri God heard his prayer Demetri will get to relive one week of his life. What happens next will change Demetri's life forever.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: The best-known Christian evangelist of the 20th century, Billy Graham gained world attention in 1949 with a tent revival in downtown Los Angeles that was scheduled for three weeks and lasted six. In the ensuing 55 years and more, 'Billy Graham Crusades' consistently drew audiences of thousands to arenas and stadiums throughout the world.'Classic Crusades' presents the best of the last 35 years of Billy Graham that brought the message of salvation through Jesus Christ to the world. World renowned actors, singers, athletes and ministers share the platform with Dr. Graham. Also often features the famous sounds of the Billy Graham Choir, George Beverly Shea and Cliff Barrows for an hour of blessing and inspiration to all who watch.

programme.title: An Interview with God
programme.desc: Upon returning home from the war in Afghanistan, Paul struggles to deal with the after-effects of his experiences, a failing marriage, and his dying faith. Not knowing where to turn, Paul dives deeply into the story of a lifetime: an interview with a mysterious man claiming to be God. What does an inquisitive reporter ask God? What would you ask? Sitting down with this mysterious man over the course of three fateful days, Paul finds himself answering as many questions as he asks. While wrestling with what he knows and what he's unsure of, Paul finds himself at the crossroads we all come to in our lives: Who do we say God is?

programme.title: A Father's Legacy
programme.desc: An inspirational story of family, loyalty and redemption. After years of searching for his father, a young man, on the run from the law, finds his way into the life of a secluded old man in the woods. As the days go by and secrets about their past are revealed, they realise they may not have been looking for each other, but they were brought together for a reason.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: Glorious Gospel Church has been meeting the needs of the community since 1990. With a vision for a church that is REAL, RELATABLE, ENJOYABLE, LIFE-CHANGING & UPLIFTING, they are committed to providing church services that will enable you to experience church this way. Impact for Life equips people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Start the new year off right by reflecting on the importance of living with God at the center of your life as Dr. Jeremiah shares crucial life lessons from the book of James.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Reason For Our Boldness/Standing Before God's Open Door
programme.desc: The In Touch program reaches the world with the Gospel with messages that tackle such issues as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships. Dr. Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching. Dr Charles Stanley is the author of more than 50 books.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: The gospel is free to everyone, but the pipeline to get it to a world that needs to hear it can be expensive. In part one of his message Building the House, Pastor Bayless looks at the construction of the temple in 1 Chronicles 29 and shares how giving generously to the Kingdom can have a tremendous impact when done with the right motives. Listen in and discover how abundant generosity can shake the world for Jesus Christ!

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham and his wife, Deb, 20 years ago. They believed that the power of God was evident in their growing church and that His Gospel message should be spread beyond the walls of that church to the world at large. They put their faith into action and purchased airtime on the Trinity Broadcasting Network. PowerPoint Ministries was then officially launched in April 1994. Over the past 19 years, PowerPoint Ministries has grown to an expansive network of local, national, and international television and radio broadcasts. In fact, PowerPoint can be seen or heard by a potential audience of millions of television viewers and radio listeners across the United States, the United Kingdom, Australia, South Africa, Iran, Russia, Israel and more. The Ministry has a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living using the most effective means to impact the world, making an eternal difference in this generation.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, USA; join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for this program of powerful music and empowering preaching. Experience from the weekend church service of Lakewood Church, the largest and fastest growing church in America that is inspiring millions of people around the world!

programme.title: The Trouble With Jessica
programme.desc: Sarah and Tom are in deep financial trouble. Their situation takes a terrifying nosedive with the shocking behaviour of uninvited dinner guest, Jessica.

programme.title: Relax, I'm from the Future
programme.desc: Casper, a time traveller, arrives in the present with a habit of meeting people he knows are about to die and confessing the truth about himself.

programme.title: The Holdovers
programme.desc: A curmudgeonly instructor at a prep school is forced to remain on campus during Christmas break to babysit a handful of students with nowhere to go.

programme.title: Northern Comfort
programme.desc: A diverse group of people with a chronic fear of flying are stranded in the wintry north.

programme.title: Lisa Frankenstein
programme.desc: A misunderstood teenager and a reanimated Victorian corpse embark on a murderous journey together to find love, happiness, and a few missing body parts.

programme.title: River Wild
programme.desc: Joey (Leighton Meester) fears there could be trouble ahead after her brother Gray (Taran Killam) invites Trevor (Adam Brody), a childhood friend with a troubled past, on their white water rafting adventure with two tourists. Once they become stranded in raging rapids, the thrill-seeking trip quickly turns from exciting to utterly terrifying as the rafters are trapped in a desperate fight for their lives, all while someone seems intent on sabotage to ensure shocking secrets stay buried. To survive the wild river, Joey will have to face her fears, and everyone will have to develop killer instincts before they're torn apart by deception aboard the raft, or by deadly waters wreaking havoc all around them.

programme.title: Dracula: Voyage of the Demeter
programme.desc: Strange events befall the merchant ship Demeter, carrying private cargo - fifty unmarked wooden crates - from Carpathia to London. Stalked each night by a merciless presence onboard the ship, when the Demeter finally arrives off the shores of England, it is a charred, derelict wreck. There is no trace of the crew.

programme.title: The Innocent
programme.desc: Criminal hijinks and unexpected romance collide when the attempts of a son who, in trying to protect his mother, finds himself in an elaborate heist.

programme.title: Children Of The Corn (2020)
programme.desc: This film describes the events leading up to, and including, the massacre of the adults of a small town in Nebraska by their children.

programme.title: The Strangers: Chapter 1
programme.desc: When their car breaks down in an eerie small town, a couple must spend the night in a remote cabin. Panic ensues as they are terrorised by three masked strangers who strike with no mercy.

programme.title: The Royal Hotel
programme.desc: Americans Hanna and Liv are best friends backpacking in Australia. After they run out of money, Liv, looking for an adventure, convinces Hanna to take a temporary live-in job behind the bar of a pub called 'The Royal Hotel' in a remote Outback mining town. Bar owner Billy and a host of locals give the girls a riotous introduction to Down Under drinking culture but soon Hanna and Liv find themselves trapped in an unnerving situation that grows rapidly out of their control.

programme.title: Reality
programme.desc: This film is based on the true story of a government leak from former American intelligence specialist Reality Winner. Saturday afternoon, June 2017, twenty-five-year old Reality Winner is confronted at her home by the FBI. A cryptic conversation begins and soon Reality's life starts to unravel.

programme.title: John Farnham: Finding the Voice
programme.desc: In this first authorised biopic, we follow John Farnham's life from the quiet suburbs of Melbourne to '60s pop fame, through incredible highs and lows, and ultimately to record-breaking success as 'Australia's Voice'.

programme.title: The Heist Before Christmas
programme.desc: A Christmas-hating boy meets two Santas in the woods, one of whom claims to have fallen from his sleigh, but he is more interested in the other man when he learns he is on the run for robbing a bank.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young boy who, in writing his yearly note to Santa, mixes up the letters and sends it to Satan instead.

programme.title: If
programme.desc: A young girl who goes through a difficult experience begins to see everyone's imaginary friends who have been left behind as their real-life friends have grown up.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 4
programme.desc: After three death-defying adventures defeating world-class villains with his unmatched courage and mad martial arts skills, Po, the Dragon Warrior (Golden Globe nominee Jack Black), is called upon by destiny to give it a rest already. More specifically, he's tapped to become the Spiritual Leader of the Valley of Peace.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: Based on the extraordinary character at the center of Charlie and the Chocolate Factory, Wonka tells the wondrous story of how the world's greatest inventor, magician and chocolate-maker became the beloved Willy Wonka we know today. A young Willy Wonka, chock-full of ideas and determined to change the world one delectable bite at a time - proving that the best things in life begin with a dream, and if you're lucky enough to meet Willy Wonka, anything is possible.

programme.title: If
programme.desc: A young girl who goes through a difficult experience begins to see everyone's imaginary friends who have been left behind as their real-life friends have grown up.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: 11-year-old Mildred's world is turned upside down when her estranged father, the washed-up magician Strawn Wise, comes to look after her and agrees to take her camping to find a mythological beast known as the Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: Ordinary Angels
programme.desc: A struggling hairdresser finds a renewed sense of purpose when she meets a widowed father and his two daughters.

programme.title: Unsung Hero
programme.desc: David Smallbone moves his family from Downunder to the States, searching for a brighter future after his successful music company collapses. With nothing more than their seven children, suitcases, and their love of music, David and his pregnant wife Helen set out to rebuild their lives. David and Helen begin to realise the musical prowess in their children, who would go on to become two of the most successful acts in Inspirational Music history.

programme.title: Uproar
programme.desc: A 17-year-old student is forced to get off the fence he has actively sat on all his life to stand up for himself, his whanau (family) and his future in this story of identity.

programme.title: Ezra
programme.desc: Comedian Max co-parents autistic son Ezra with ex-wife Jenna. Faced with crucial decisions about Ezra's future, Max and Ezra go on a life-changing cross-country road trip.

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: As Arthur Curry confronts the responsibilities of being King of the Seven Seas, a long-buried ancient power is unleashed. After witnessing the full effect of these dark forces, Aquaman must forge an uneasy alliance with an old enemy, and embark on a treacherous journey to protect his family, his kingdom, and the world from irreversible devastation.

programme.title: The Flash
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Barry uses his superpowers to travel back in time in order to change the events of the past. But when his attempt to save his family inadvertently alters the future, Barry becomes trapped in a reality in which General Zod has returned, threatening annihilation, and there are no Super Heroes to turn to. That is unless Barry can coax a very different Batman out of retirement and rescue an imprisoned Kryptonian albeit not the one he's looking for. Ultimately, to save the world that he is in and return to the future that he knows, Barry's only hope is to race for his life. But will making the ultimate sacrifice be enough to reset the universe?

programme.title: The Mountain Within Me
programme.desc: After suffering a spinal cord injury, professional rugby player Ed Jackson's world changes forever. Following Ed's journey on his recovery as he achieves the heights of Snowdonia, the Alps and Himalayas.

programme.title: Reunion
programme.desc: Snowbound at their high school reunion, former classmates uncover a murder and scramble to identify the killer among them before they're all iced out for good.

programme.title: River Wild
programme.desc: Joey (Leighton Meester) fears there could be trouble ahead after her brother Gray (Taran Killam) invites Trevor (Adam Brody), a childhood friend with a troubled past, on their white water rafting adventure with two tourists. Once they become stranded in raging rapids, the thrill-seeking trip quickly turns from exciting to utterly terrifying as the rafters are trapped in a desperate fight for their lives, all while someone seems intent on sabotage to ensure shocking secrets stay buried. To survive the wild river, Joey will have to face her fears, and everyone will have to develop killer instincts before they're torn apart by deception aboard the raft, or by deadly waters wreaking havoc all around them.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Dune: Part Two will explore the mythic journey of Paul Atreides as he unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a warpath of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the known universe, he endeavors to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: The world's favourite Bad Boys are back with their iconic mix of edge-of-your seat action and outrageous comedy, but this time with a twist: Miami's finest are now on the run.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: He's a stuntman, and like everyone in the stunt community, he gets blown up, shot, crashed, thrown through windows and dropped from the highest of heights, all for our entertainment. And now, fresh off an almost career-ending accident, this working-class hero has to track down a missing movie star, solve a conspiracy and try to win back the love of his life while still doing his day job. What could possibly go right?

programme.title: Anyone But You
programme.desc: Bea and Ben's initial attraction quickly turns sour until they must pretend to be a couple.

programme.title: Master Gardener
programme.desc: A meticulous horticulturist is devoted to tending the grounds of a beautiful estate and pandering to his employer, the wealthy dowager.

programme.title: Aristotle and Dante
programme.desc: Mexican teenagers Aristotle Mendoza and Dante Quintana explore their friendship while struggling with racial and ethnic identity, sexuality and family relationships in 1987, Texas.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Dune: Part Two will explore the mythic journey of Paul Atreides as he unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a warpath of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the known universe, he endeavors to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: If
programme.desc: A young girl who goes through a difficult experience begins to see everyone's imaginary friends who have been left behind as their real-life friends have grown up.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
programme.desc: The Spenglers return to the New York City firehouse where the original Ghostbusters have taken ghost-busting to the next level. When the discovery of an ancient artefact unleashes an evil force, Ghostbusters new and old must unite to save the world.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds (2005)
programme.desc: Ray Ferrier is a working class man living in New Jersey. He's estranged from his family, his life isn't in order, and he's too caught up with himself. But the unthinkable and ultimately the unexpected happens to him in an extraordinary sense. His small town life is shaken violently by the arrival of destructive intruders: Aliens which have come in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, Ray must come to the defence of his children. As the world must fend for itself by a new and very advanced enemy not of this world, its inhabitants must save humanity from a far greater force than threatens to destroy it.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)
programme.desc: Thought safely entombed deep beneath the desert, an ancient princess, whose destiny was unjustly taken from her, is awakened in our current day. Her malevolence has grown over millennia and with it come terrors that defy human comprehension.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Fallout
programme.desc: On a dangerous assignment to recover stolen plutonium, Ethan Hunt chooses to save his team over completing the mission, allowing nuclear weapons to fall into the hands of a deadly network of highly-skilled operatives intent on destroying civilization. Now, with the world at risk, Ethan and his IMF team are forced to become reluctant partners with a hard-hitting CIA agent as they race against time to stop the nuclear fallout. There's never been a threat more destructive, stunts so jaw-dropping in the film critics are calling the best "Mission" yet!

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team embark on their most dangerous mission yet: To track down a terrifying new weapon that threatens all of humanity if falls into the wrong hands. Confronted by a mysterious, all-powerful enemy, Ethan is forced to consider that nothing can matter more than his mission - not even the lives of those he cares about most.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the year 2054, the head of a police unit specialising in pre-crime - the arrest and conviction of murderers before they commit their crime - finds himself accused of a future murder.

programme.title: Top Gun
programme.desc: A pilot is selected to attend the Top Gun Naval Flying School while also pursuing a relationship with an instructor.

programme.title: A Few Good Men
programme.desc: Defence lawyers Daniel Kaffee and Joanne Galloway are assigned the case of defending two US soldiers, accused of murdering a fellow soldier who was deemed to have 'broken the code'. Kaffee and Galloway soon run into a brick wall with Col Nathan Jessep, who sees himself as a military 'untouchable'. The accused claim they were obeying orders, and that the death was an accident.

programme.title: Rock of Ages
programme.desc: The story of small town girl Sherrie and city boy Drew, who meet on the Sunset Strip while pursuing their Hollywood dreams. Their rock 'n' roll romance is told through the heart-pounding hits of Def Leppard, Joan Jett, Journey, Foreigner, Bon Jovi, and more.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds (2005)
programme.desc: Ray Ferrier is a working class man living in New Jersey. He's estranged from his family, his life isn't in order, and he's too caught up with himself. But the unthinkable and ultimately the unexpected happens to him in an extraordinary sense. His small town life is shaken violently by the arrival of destructive intruders: Aliens which have come in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, Ray must come to the defence of his children. As the world must fend for itself by a new and very advanced enemy not of this world, its inhabitants must save humanity from a far greater force than threatens to destroy it.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: This spectacular adventure pits Godzilla, the world's famous monster, against malevolent creatures that, bolstered by humanity's scientific arrogance, threaten our very existence.

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: When a scientific expedition to an uncharted island awakens titanic forces of nature, a mission of discovery becomes an explosive war between monster and man.

programme.title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
programme.desc: An epic action adventure that pits Godzilla against some of the most popular monsters in pop culture history. The new story follows the heroic efforts of the crypto-zoological agency Monarch as its members face off against a battery of god-sized monsters, including the mighty Godzilla, who collides with Mothra, Rodan, and his ultimate nemesis, the three-headed King Ghidorah. When these ancient super-species thought to be mere myths rise again, they all vie for supremacy, leaving humanity's very existence hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: Legends collide as Godzilla and Kong, the two most powerful forces of nature, clash on the big screen in a spectacular battle for the ages. As a squadron embarks on a perilous mission into fantastic uncharted terrain, unearthing clues to the Titans' very origins and mankind's survival, a conspiracy threatens to wipe the creatures, both good and bad, from the face of the earth forever.

programme.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
programme.desc: Godzilla and the almighty Kong face a colossal threat hidden deep within the planet, challenging their very existence and the survival of the human race.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: This spectacular adventure pits Godzilla, the world's famous monster, against malevolent creatures that, bolstered by humanity's scientific arrogance, threaten our very existence.

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: When a scientific expedition to an uncharted island awakens titanic forces of nature, a mission of discovery becomes an explosive war between monster and man.

programme.desc: Legends collide as Godzilla and Kong, the two most powerful forces of nature, clash on the big screen in a spectacular battle for the ages. As a squadron embarks on a perilous mission into fantastic uncharted terrain, unearthing clues to the Titans' very origins and mankind's survival, a conspiracy threatens to wipe the creatures, both good and bad, from the face of the earth forever.

programme.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
programme.desc: Godzilla and the almighty Kong face a colossal threat hidden deep within the planet, challenging their very existence and the survival of the human race.

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: When a scientific expedition to an uncharted island awakens titanic forces of nature, a mission of discovery becomes an explosive war between monster and man.

programme.title: Abominable
programme.desc: When teenage Yi encounters a young Yeti on the roof of her apartment building in a modern Chinese city, she and her mischievous friends, Jin and Peng, name him Everest and embark on an epic quest to reunite the magical creature with his family at the highest point on Earth. But the trio of friends will have to stay one-step ahead of Burnish, a wealthy man intent on capturing a Yeti, and zoologist Dr. Zara to help Everest get home.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: From the Academy Award nominated film How to Train Your Dragon comes the next chapter in the epic trilogy. When Hiccup and Toothless discover a secret ice cave filled with hundreds of wild dragons and a mysterious Dragon Rider, the two friends find themselves at the centre of an epic battle to save the future of men and dragons!

programme.title: Dora Saves the Mermaids
programme.desc: Dora and Boots need your help to save Mermaid Kingdom from a mean, garbage-dumping Octopus by bringing a magical mermaid crown back to Mariana the Mermaid. But how will Dora get to Mermaid Kingdom?

programme.title: Turbo
programme.desc: A high velocity comedy about an underdog snail who kicks into overdrive when he miraculously attains the power of super-speed. But after making fast friends with a crew of streetwise, tricked-out es-car-goes, Turbo learns that no one succeeds on their own. So he puts his heart and shell on the line to help his pals achieve their dreams, before Turbo-charging his own impossible dream: winning the Indy 500.

programme.title: Monster House
programme.desc: Horace Nebbercracker is the meanest man in town, heaven forbid anything that lands on his lawn or he'll snatch it away forever. DJ's obsession with spying on the creepy house across the street has made him a bit of an outcast, but he's determined to get to the bottom of the mystery.

programme.title: The Tiger's Apprentice
programme.desc: Tom Lee discovers he is part of a long lineage of magical protectors known as the Guardians. With guidance from a mythical tiger named Hu, Tom trains to take on an evil force that threatens humanity.

programme.title: The Road to El Dorado
programme.desc: Get ready for an exhilarating ride of a lifetime! Join Tulio and Miguel and their hilarious horse Altivo as they set sail, map in hand, in search of golden treasure in the all-star adventure, The Road to El Dorado! Upon landing on the shores of El Dorado, the legendary Lost City of Gold, Tulio and Miguel are mistaken for gods and are lavished with riches beyond their wildest dreams! As friendship, loyalty, and greed collide, our unlikely heroes must make the decision of their lives: run off with the gold or face unforeseen dangers to save the people of El Dorado.

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Set at the dawn of time when prehistoric creatures roamed the earth, Early Man tells the story of courageous caveman Dug and his sidekick Hognob who, together with their fearless new friend Goona, must unite their Stone Age Tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: The Cat in the Hat who goes by that name is played by Mike Myers of comedy fame! It starts with two kids on a cold, cold wet day their mum is at work and they've no games to play! Then in walks the fun in the form of a Cat who pulls out the laughs from the brim of his hat. Things really get wild when the Cat and his crew (who go by the name of Thing One and Thing Two) take over the house of Conrad and Sally in this fine family film that's right up your alley!

programme.title: Combat Wombat: Back 2 Back
programme.desc: An evil tech genius threatens to turn the city into a metaverse simulation, leaving the Combat Wombat to save the day.

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: When the dads expand their childcare magic to Camp Driftwood, serving up sports, crafts and teaching the kids a thing or two about nature, they discover the camp has everything it needs except a plan to put the bullies of rival Camp Canola to shame. With some quick thinking, teamwork, a secret weapon and some off-the-wall crazy antics, the dads and kids unite to make sure Daddy Day Camp secures its rightful place in kid camp history.

programme.title: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween
programme.desc: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween follows the Quinn family - high school senior Sarah, her middle school brother Sony, and their mother Kathy into an entirely new set of spooky, exciting, and funny events. Sonny and schoolmate Sam are best friends with a side job as the "Junk Brothers," collecting discarded stuff other people don't want. But it's a gig that unfortunately leads them right into the path of (gulp) Slappy, the mischievous ventriloquist dummy from an unpublished Goosebumps book.

programme.title: Inspector Sun
programme.desc: Fired from his detective job after a mission goes awry, Inspector Sun boards a seemingly normal plane for a much-needed vacation. However, when Dr. Spindlethorp receives a threat on his life, Sun is back on the case, trapped in a web of lies.

programme.title: An American Girl: Chrissa Stands Strong
programme.desc: This family drama follows Chrissa Maxwell, who moves with her parents to snowy Minnesota, where she has to start at a new school mid-year, but is worried she won't fit in and will have trouble making new friends. On her very first day, Chrissa is seated with three girls who greet her with teasing and tricks. The 'Mean Bees' bully Chrissa and the other kids in class, on the bus, online, and even at swim club. Chrissa can't seem to make any new friends, not even with the girl who seems to need a friend the most. When the biggest bully becomes Chrissa's swimming rival, the taunting finally goes too far. Can Chrissa find a way to stand strong and stop the bullying?

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Gru, his adorable girls, and the mischievous Minions are back with a cast of unforgettable new characters in the blockbuster sequel to the worldwide phenomenon. Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world. Partnered with secret agent Lucy Wilde, Gru, along with the wildly unpredictable Minions, must figure out how to keep his cover while also keeping up with his duties as a father. Get ready for more Minion madness.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Evil wizard Gargamel creates a couple of mischievous Smurf-like creatures called the Naughties hoping they will let him harness the magical Smurf-essence. However, he soon discovers that he needs the help of Smurfette, who knows the secret to turning the Naughties into real Smurfs. When Gargamel and his Naughties kidnap Smurfette from Smurf Village and bring her to Paris, it's up to Papa, Clumsy, Grouchy and Vanity to reunite with their human friends, Patrick and Grace Winslow, and rescue her!

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Starting as single-celled yellow organisms, Minions evolve through the ages, perpetually serving the most despicable of masters. Continuously unsuccessful at keeping these masters, from T-rex to Napoleon, the Minions find themselves without someone to serve and fall into a deep depression. One Minion named Kevin has a plan, and he, alongside teenage rebel Stuart and lovable little Bob, ventures out into the world to find a new evil boss for his brethren to follow. The trio embarks upon a thrilling journey that ultimately leads them to their next potential master, Scarlet Overkill, the world's first-ever female supervillain. They travel from frigid Antarctica to 1960s New York City, ending in mod London, where they must face their biggest challenge to-date: saving all of Minionkind from annihilation.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman
programme.desc: Mr Peabody, the most accomplished dog in the world, and his mischievous boy Sherman, use their time machine - the WABAC - to go on the most outrageous adventures known to man or dog.
