Phil wakes the next morning to find it is Groundhog Day all over again and again and again.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Marty McFly, a typical American teenager of the 1980s, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered DeLorean time machine, invented by a slightly mad scientist. During his often hysterical but amazing trip back in time, Marty must make certain his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so that he can get back to the future.

programme.title: The Karate Kid (1984)
programme.desc: A new kid in town who is picked on by bullies learns karate and eastern philosophy from Mr Miyagi, and learns how to fight back.

programme.title: Junior
programme.desc: You'll never guess who's going to have a baby. Watch as the maternal tables are turned forever when, after taking an experimental drug, a male scientist becomes pregnant.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Too
programme.desc: Mikey the wisecracking tot acquires a baby sister with the same wry sense of humor. Meanwhile their parents have emerged out of wedded bliss to face some real-life issues involving money problems and a gun-toting relative. Mikey is also learning how to use the toilet for the first time.

programme.title: The Money Pit
programme.desc: Walter and Anna believe they've arrived 'home sweet home' when they buy the house of their dreams. But life quickly becomes a nightmare as their dilapidated mansion falls apart around them, and they struggle to stay together even as they slide further into the money pit. It's outrageous entertainment for anyone who's ever been deeply in love or deeply in debt or both.

programme.title: Wayne's World
programme.desc: From Wayne's basement, Wayne and Garth broadcast a talk-show called "Wayne's World" on local public access television. The show comes to the attention of a sleazy network executive who wants to produce a big-budget version of "Wayne's World"-and he also wants Wayne's girlfriend, a rock singer named Cassandra. Wayne and Garth have to battle the executive not only to save their show, but also Cassandra.

programme.title: The River Wild
programme.desc: A former river guide arranges a white-water rafting trip to celebrate her son's birthday and salvage her shaky marriage. Her skills and courage are soon put to the test when three mysterious strangers threaten to turn their vacation into a living hell.

programme.title: Top Secret!
programme.desc: This rock 'n' roll spy spoof is about an Elvis-like pop idol who becomes embroiled in intrigue on a tour of East Germany and falls in love with a French Resistance Fighter. Non-stop pop-up cameos, pelvis-shaking parodies and dead-pan homage to WWII underground heroics make this an overlooked gem.

programme.title: Wildcats
programme.desc: As the daughter of a legendary grid iron star, a young woman's greatest desire is to coach a team of her own. But when the chauvinistic powers-that-be assign her to an inner-city ghetto school, the spirited female has her work cut out for her.

programme.title: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Cheryl's daughter goes missing and is nowhere to be found. Authorities and the media dismiss her as a runaway while they focus on another missing girl, who is white.

programme.title: Bury The Past
programme.desc: Alice was married to a deranged, abusive man: a police officer who was regarded as a pillar of the community, but was secretly a monster. After Alice killed him in self-defense, fearing her story would never be believed, she fled and went into hiding. But now an old police buddy of her dead husband is on her porch. He has tracked her down and wants money to keep silent.

programme.title: Big Lies in a Small Town
programme.desc: A young mother, Rachel, frantically searches for her teen daughter, Hannah after their car crashed outside of a small town in the middle of nowhere and her daughter goes missing. People die mysteriously in Rachels wake as she gets closer to finding out that the small town doctor kidnapped her daughter. He and his wife never got over the tragic loss of their teen daughter and it turns out that Hannah is the perfect surrogate to take her place. Rachel desperately needs to find and rescue her daughter before she is forced to play this role for the rest of her life.

programme.title: Amish Witches: Story of Holmes County
programme.desc: A reality TV crew moves into Holmes County, Ohio, to document the lives of an isolated sect of Swartzentruber Amish. Production is halted by the death of a Brauchau, an Amish witch.

programme.title: Once Upon a Main Street
programme.desc: Amelia, who wants to open a year-round Christmas store, bids for a shop lot against Vic, who wants to open a chocolate shop. Rivalry becomes romance when they must work together.

programme.title: The Lost Wife of Robert Durst
programme.desc: Young and wide-eyed Kathie falls in love with charming, yet quirky real estate scion Robert Durst, only to find their marriage turning stranger, darker and more disturbing as time passes. But when Kathie disappears in 1982, her family and friends are deeply disturbed that her disappearance isn't taken seriously by police. While Durst is currently in jail awaiting trial for the murder of his close friend, journalist Susan Berman, the questions linger as to what really happened to Kathie. This film pulls back the curtain on the world of Robert Durst and explores what may have happened between him and Kathie.

programme.title: Menendez: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: Erik and Lyle Menendez were educated, nice boys from sunny Beverly Hills, California. Erik was an exceptional tennis player and Lyle was studying at Princeton University. So when their parents were found shot dead in their home, no one could figure out why they would have done it? Everyone was perplexed. Was it for Money? For Fame? The case seemed closed, but that';s when the brothers revealed that they were sexually molested throughout their childhoods by their father, Jose. This was the trial that no one was ready for. Our story follows Erik and Lyle as they struggle with their overwhelming guilt, the harsh reality of abuse, incest and molestation that lead them down this path and the trial that shocked an entire nation of television watchers. Never before seen details emerge as we look closer into the lives of the Menendez brothers.

programme.title: I Was Lorena Bobbitt
programme.desc: It's been 26 years, but everyone still knows the notorious case of Lorena Bobbitt. But what's gotten lost in the countless tabloid headlines and tasteless jokes that followed was the story of a severely abused young woman whose torment, both physical and mental, at the hands of her husband pushed her over the edge. In this Lifetime Original movie, Lorena tells her story, and we follow her journey from a wide-eyed, immigrant bride to a battered wife, and an unlikely media sensation, with her ultimately emerging as a strong, thoughtful woman who has devoted her life to advocating for other abused women.

programme.title: Random Acts of Christmas
programme.desc: While uncovering who is behind the random acts of Christmas popping up around her city, a journalist meets a competing reporter who captures her heart.

programme.title: Cyberstalker
programme.desc: Thirteen years ago, Aiden's world was torn apart after an online stalker followed her into the real world and broke into her home to claim the object of his desire. The resulting night of terror ended with the murders of both Aiden's mother and father. The stalker escaped the scene without Aiden seeing his face; he is gone without a trace, an unknown man, a murderer now watching Aiden's every move. To escape this danger Aiden spends the next 13 years offline, in therapy and secluded anonymity. Who should Aiden trust in a web of deception where no one may be who they seem? There is nowhere for Aiden to hide when someone wants to love her to death. Mischa Barton, Dan Levy and Ron Lea star. (2012)

programme.title: The Pastor's Wife
programme.desc: Mary, a dutiful preacher's wife and mother of three, becomes the prime suspect in her husband's murder. What went on behind this perfect family's closed doors? Based on a true story.

programme.title: Christmas In Wonderland
programme.desc: When two kids find a hoard of cash, it looks like Christmas has come early - until the crooks who counterfeited the money go after them.

programme.title: The Inherited
programme.desc: Eve's happily-ever-after with the man of her dreams becomes a waking nightmare after they move into the house willed to him by his first wife, who died under horrific circumstances.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: Over the objection of his girlfriend, Ben agrees to take a job as the live-in manservant to a wealthy businesswoman, Amanda, but quickly realises he has made a deal with the devil, and has put himself and his girlfriend in mortal jeopardy.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Ruby
programme.desc: In the heart of the bayou, Ruby Landry lives a simple, happy life. The only family Ruby Landry has ever known are her loving guardian, Grandmere Catherine, a Cajun spiritual healer, and her drunken, outcast Grandpere Jack. Her life is filled with hope and promise, especially when her attraction for handsome Paul Tate blossoms into a mysterious, wonderful love. But Paul's wealthy parents forbid him to associate with a poor Landry while Grandmere urges her to follow her dream of becoming a great painter. In a faded photograph, Ruby glimpses for the first time the image of her father and learns of a shameful deception and a shocking scheme of blackmail that now must come to light. Stunned by these revelations, she is devastated when Grandmere dies, leaving her to seek out her father in his vast New Orleans mansion. There, in a house of lies, madness, and cruel torment, Ruby clings to her memories of Paul to keep her heart alive. For only their love can save her now.

programme.title: Surviving The Sleepover
programme.desc: Outspoken teenager Hannah goes to a sleepover at a popular girl's house, not realising she was only invited to be the victim of a prank.

programme.title: The Man in the Guest House
programme.desc: When a couple converts their garage into a second living space to rent out, they think they've found the perfect source of extra income, but their first renter soon proves to be the worst.

programme.title: Hometown Christmas
programme.desc: Back in Louisiana for Christmas, Noelle Collins has big plans to resurrect the town's live nativity, a beloved tradition that her late mother used to put on. Things become complicated, however, when Noelle runs into her high school sweetheart, Nick Russell, a rising baseball star also back home due to a recent injury. Still feeling the burn from their senior year break-up, their lives are pushed together even further when they learn their parents share an attraction and want to be more than just friends. When things begin to fall apart with the live nativity Nick and Noelle reluctantly team up to pull off the show and find themselves growing close, uncovering a hometown love for each other and the joy of Christmas that both never really faded away.

programme.title: No One Would Tell
programme.desc: Laura Collins (Shannen Doherty), single mum to daughter Sarah (Matreya Scarrwener), has had a history of rocky relationships, so when Sarah begins dating the popular and charismatic Rob Tennison (Callan Potter), Laura is thrilled with what she sees. But when it becomes increasingly clear that Rob has a darker, possessive side, Laura lives in a state of denial about her daughter's relationship until Sarah goes missing. Laura must find the will to fight for justice for Sarah when a case against Rob is brought to trial and presided over by a powerful judge (Mira Sorvino).

programme.title: The Boarding School Murders
programme.desc: Foster teen Frankie attends an elite Swiss boarding school. One of her classmates is murdered and everyone is quick to blame Frankie. She must prove innocence before becoming a prime suspect.

programme.title: Four Christmases and a Wedding
programme.desc: Chloe plans the Christmas Fair where she meets Evan and falls in love but he goes to Norway for his dream job.

programme.title: Abducted at an HBCU
programme.desc: College counsellor Ellen becomes concerned when Shannon, a student who's struggling financially, suddenly stops going to classes.

programme.title: Abducted on Prom Night
programme.desc: Against her better judgement, a recently-divorced mother allows her troubled daughter to attend prom, but what was supposed to be the best night of their lives, turns into a twisted game of cat-and-mouse as the daughter and her friends are taken hostage by their limousine driver, who has a sinister connection to her family.

programme.title: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: A woman and her husband become increasingly scared as an anonymous person begins stalking their family.

programme.title: My Child has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica discovers that his biological father is actually her fertility doctor, she teams up with another one of the doctor's clients to bring him to justice.

programme.title: Christmas in Mississippi
programme.desc: Photographer Holly Logan (Jana Kramer) returns to her hometown of Gulfport, Mississippi for Christmas. The town is resurrecting their traditional holiday light show for the first time since a terrible hurricane struck five years earlier. Holly volunteers to pitch in, but has second thoughts when she discovers that the festival is run by her high-school sweetheart Mike (Wes Brown). Now Holly must spend the next few days with the man who broke her heart. With the help of her matchmaking mom Caroline (Faith Ford) and Mr. Kriss, the kind man who will play Santa in the town's celebration, Holly begins to fall in love with her hometown, and Mike, all over again.

programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: Model Kara Woods begins to get disturbing messages from one of her fans, causing her to seek help from a security influencer. Things are fine until Kara's stalker shows up in person.

programme.title: Happy Face Killer
programme.desc: Grisly serial killer Keith Hunter Jesperson taunts authorities with scribbled confessions bearing a smiley face at the scenes of his crimes. Based on a true story.

programme.title: And Baby Will Fall
programme.desc: Expectant parents become prime suspects in the disappearance of a pregnant woman who was last seen at their garage sale.

programme.title: The Paramedic Who Stalked Me
programme.desc: After a deadly accident, a young woman becomes the target of an obsessed EMT worker who saved her life.

programme.title: A Model Murder
programme.desc: Model Kara Woods begins to get disturbing messages from one of her fans, causing her to seek help from a security influencer. Things are fine until Kara's stalker shows up in person.

programme.title: My Father's Murder in Greece
programme.desc: When Allie's father George takes her on a celebratory trip to Greece to discover her familial roots, George is murdered. Allie must uncover family secrets to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Revenge For My Mother
programme.desc: Audrey teaches postnatal fitness to a group of mums who bring their baby strollers to the park, but when her recently-hired assistant secretly starts exacting revenge, Audrey's perfect world erupts into madness.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' All That Glitters
programme.desc: Driven from the Dumas Mansion back to her beloved bayou, Ruby is determined to make a secure and happy home for her precious infant daughter, Pearl. Paul Tate, her first love, is at her side once more with dazzling wealth. Whisking her into his grand house, it seems their future is assured. But the thick, expensive walls of Cypress Woods cannot shut out the terrible memories and shocking reasons that have woven their fabric over her destiny, or the cold eyes of Paul's mother, Gladys, reminding Ruby of the secret she must keep to give Pearl a loving father. Desperate to find the complete, fulfilling life she craves, Ruby builds a precarious new existence, a flimsy shanty of hope that the first flood washes away. Only when the storm exposes the very blackest evils of the past will she glimpse the rainbow's fragile promise, a morning of sunshine and laughter with a family of her own.

programme.title: The Christmas Consultant
programme.desc: A workaholic mother gets more than she bargained for when she hires a sought after consultant to help her and her family through the holidays.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets By the Lake
programme.desc: This whodunit murder mystery uncovers the secrets kept by the idyllic lakeside town of Thornwood Heights. It tells the story of the prodigal daughter who returns home to prove her sister's innocence of murder but is met by a lost, forbidden love, dark family secrets and a long standing family rivalry fuelled by the disappearance of a childhood best friend.

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: A woman moves to a new town and opens her own gourmet restaurant after escaping from an abusive relationship. However, she soon finds herself in a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: My Nightmare Office Affair
programme.desc: Nick is a successful executive with a picture-perfect family, loving wife and adorable daughter. It looks like he has it all to his boss, Lisa, who desperately wants a child of her own. Lisa seduces Nick in his moment of weakness, hoping to remove his wife from the picture so she can fill her role as wife and mother. When Nick tries to break things off with Lisa, he finds himself in a dangerous game with her that threatens his job, his family and his life.

programme.title: A Killer Among Us
programme.desc: After the shocking murder of her mother, a girl helps an unorthodox police detective with his investigation by searching her home for clues to crack the case.

programme.title: Blonde and Blonder
programme.desc: When two dim-witted blonde bombshells are mistaken for the underworld's most cunning assassins, they are approached with a lucrative contract to take out the head of the Chinese mafia in a globetrotting, air-headed comedy. Two fair-haired beauties have just witnessed a high-profile mob hit, and now the Godfather is convinced that they have what it takes to rub out his most fearsome rival. After accepting a hearty payout and agreeing to carry out the dangerous assignment, the two brainless beauties hit the open road on the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: Cyberstalker
programme.desc: Thirteen years ago, Aiden's world was torn apart after an online stalker followed her into the real world and broke into her home to claim the object of his desire. The resulting night of terror ended with the murders of both Aiden's mother and father. The stalker escaped the scene without Aiden seeing his face; he is gone without a trace, an unknown man, a murderer now watching Aiden's every move. To escape this danger Aiden spends the next 13 years offline, in therapy and secluded anonymity. Who should Aiden trust in a web of deception where no one may be who they seem? There is nowhere for Aiden to hide when someone wants to love her to death. Mischa Barton, Dan Levy and Ron Lea star. (2012)

programme.title: Christmas In Wonderland
programme.desc: When two kids find a hoard of cash, it looks like Christmas has come early - until the crooks who counterfeited the money go after them.

programme.title: Maid for Revenge
programme.desc: When a struggling young maid wakes up next to her client's pool covered in blood, she discovers the owner dead in the water and her eight-year-old son's life is in jeopardy. With no memory of what happened, she races to uncover the truth. Inspired by true events.

programme.title: A Sister's Nightmare
programme.desc: Police officer Jane Rydert's life goes into a tailspin the day her older sister Cassidy shows up at her door after 16 years of confinement in a psychiatric hospital.

programme.title: An Amish Murder
programme.desc: A woman returns to the Amish farming community of her youth, but her peace is shattered when a murder investigation exposes a dark secret that could destroy her.

programme.title: Couples Retreat Murder
programme.desc: Becky and Jim head to a remote couple's retreat to try and save their marriage. However, when a guest goes missing and their host is found dead, they start to wonder who else they're trapped with.

programme.title: FOX SPORTS News
programme.desc: The latest highlights, reaction and analysis of the biggest sport stories from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Millennial Money
programme.desc: Putting the "personal" in personal finance, get an inside look at the lives and finances of millennials. See exactly how much they earn, what they spend it on and how they invest. From starting a business to changing careers, getting in and out of debt, creating an unusual income stream, or casting it all aside to start over again. Young people reveal the steps they took to make it happen. Including how much they get paid, what they spend on food, shelter and fun, and how thy plan on saving for the future, Millennial Money takes a revealing look into the one area people seem to never talk about: their money.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: "American Greed" goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich. Their complex scams leave victim's lives in shambles. Each episode is a deep dive into the minds and actions of heartless crooks who live lives most people can only dream of. But how many luxury homes and exotic cars does it take to justify these white collar crimes? Ultimately for the crooks the dream turns into a nightmare when their shady plans unravel. "American Greed" follows the money through the eyes of the criminals, the victims, and the investigators who bring these scammers to justice.

Including how much they get paid, what they spend on food, shelter and fun, and how thy plan on saving for the future, Millennial Money takes a revealing look into the one area people seem to never talk about: their money.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: "American Greed" goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich. Their complex scams leave victim's lives in shambles. Each episode is a deep dive into the minds and actions of heartless crooks who live lives most people can only dream of. But how many luxury homes and exotic cars does it take to justify these white collar crimes? Ultimately for the crooks the dream turns into a nightmare when their shady plans unravel. "American Greed" follows the money through the eyes of the criminals, the victims, and the investigators who bring these scammers to justice.

programme.desc: Rivals Buster and Plucky decide to throw an epic pizza party and are shocked to find out they're actually getting along while Babs and Sweetie get into their first roommate disagreement.

programme.title: Tiny Toons Looniversity
programme.desc: Rivals Buster and Plucky decide to throw an epic pizza party and are shocked to find out they're actually getting along while Babs and Sweetie get into their first roommate disagreement.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey
programme.desc: Jake's wish to live in a real live musical comes true, after he knocks the wish granting 'David Coppertrout' out of the Central Stream. Soon, everyone is singing, all the time, except ironically, for Jake. Turns out, he has no musical talent or ability, and unless he finds some, he and his friends will be trapped in the musical nightmare forever.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey
programme.desc: During the school holidays, Jake, Adam and the gang head to Hawaii to rescue Mrs Warthog from seemingly hungry natives. Meanwhile, Pixiefrog and the rest of the faculty are under siege from flocks of migrating bird students returning to CDMS.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey
programme.desc: Adam decides to spend his summer in the junior zookeeper training program at the Zooquarium, but as he quickly discovers, his animal friends are not fond of zookeepers.

programme.title: My Gym Partner's a Monkey
programme.desc: Adam's love of Thanksgiving doesn't translate to the animal world. Some ghosts haunt him and try to show him how horrible Thanksgiving is, but in the end, everyone finds the love in Turkey Day.

programme.title: Craig Of The Creek
programme.desc: The Tournament - Hoping to win a special prize for his Dad's birthday, Craig and his friends compete in a tournament on the Other Side of the Creek!

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: When Buttercup starts spending a lot of time with her new friends, a group of bad-girl skaters called The Derbytantes, it seems the Powerpuff Girls are down to two, which delights Princess Morbucks, who wants to fill the empty slot.

programme.title: Lego Ninjago Dragons Rising
programme.desc: One year after "The Merge," Ninja-fan Arin and his friend, Sora, risk everything to save the life of a hunted young dragon named Riyu.

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: With a parasitic alien on the loose in their school, the Powerpuff Girls and Bliss have to find a way to stop it before the big dance.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are joking around, but when Tobias joins in and makes fun of Gumball, he's incredibly offended. They explain to Tobias that to make those jokes he'd need to be higher on Gumball's friend list. They think that's the end of it, but Tobias is after that number one spot.

programme.title: Mechamato
programme.desc: A brutal food review drives robo-chef Garamsey to kidnap Deep. Amato has to save Deep before he becomes the next course.

programme.title: Foster's Home for Imaginary Friends
programme.desc: When Mac is recruited to be the sidekick of a Super Hero Imaginary Friend, Bloo becomes jealous and joins forces with an Super Villain Imaginary Friend.

programme.title: The Powerpuff Girls
programme.desc: After going overboard on the candy, Blossom and Buttercup wake up with no memory of last night and no idea where Bubbles is! They must piece together the events of last night and find Bubbles before the Professor gets back!

programme.title: Tangranimals
programme.desc: A baby Tangra-sponge has wandered all the way onto the plain. It must be brought back to its family in the Tangra-Aah! Hills!

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.sub-title: The Legend Of Jack O'lantern/The Mecha T-Rex
programme.desc: It's Halloween and everything is set for the Zee Mobile to pull the haunted hayride until it drives away. / Timmy can't wait to trick or treat this year as a Mecha T-Rex, but his Halloween is almost ruined when he can't reach the arms to his costume.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: The Martians want to help LLoyd deliver packages around Pretty Big City. / MacBarm and Zee have built a slide that sends people all the way across the farm.

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.desc: When Mel's pretzel is eaten by a pigeon, Barney creates a high-seas adventure to find another, but it goes awry when Captain Mel doesn't listen to her crew. Mel realizes it's important to listen to others when you're working as a team.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.sub-title: That Ol' Time Rock Rolls!/ Make Like A Banana And Split
programme.desc: Berta is taking a picture with Big Old Boulder for the museum, but needs the Mechas help when the boulder rolls down the hill towards the museum! / It's Food Day in Pretty Big City.

programme.title: Tangranimals
programme.desc: Toff has brought her friends to a dino-pong match. But since they know nothing about the game, they accidentally disrupt it, causing it to grind to a halt!

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Missing Crystal Pinecone/The Pretty Big Thing
programme.desc: Izzy and Timmy go to dig up treasure at the top of Lawrence Pinecone's Statue's shadow and find nothing there! / The mysterious "Pretty Big Thing" is scaring the people of Pretty Big City, so it's up to the Mechas to find out what it is.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.sub-title: Yip Yip Tree Tree/ The Snowman Scarecrow
programme.desc: When all the ornaments on the Pretty Big City tree break, it's up to the Mechas to build new ones and save the holidays for their friends. / It's time for Zee and MacBarm's gift exchange, but the snowman scarecrow Zee made for MacBarm keeps blowing away!

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: The magnet crane at the construction site accidentally turns on, sucking up all the metal, including some of the Mecha Builders! / Roof is delivering eggs to Marwyn at the Treetop Woods Train Station.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: It's MacBarm's day off and Zee takes over harvesting carrots with his Zee mobile, but when it breaks, the work still needs to be done. / Ranger Nat is bringing a playhouse on the train for Timmy and Izzy, but it won't fit through the tunnel!

programme.title: Tangranimals
programme.desc: It's night in the middle of the day. And very cold. In fact, Bao & Bao are freezing! Our friends must get to the bottom of this strange phenomenon, ASAP!

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: There's a leak at the space station and the solution is Zee's sticky slime, until it spills on Zee and MacBarm, who get stuck together. / When Marwyn runs out of ice, the Martians send a giant hunk of ice.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.sub-title: They Sent Us A Pie/Dust In The Wind
programme.desc: A giant pie is sent to Pretty Big City to stop an asteroid, but that discovery is made only after the Mechas and friends have eaten the whole thing. / The Singing Stone Heads are ready to perform at Big Old Boulder Museum.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Hero Celebration Day is finishing off with a slideshow of the everyday heroes. / Pretty Big City is cooling off from a hot day with an ice slide in the park, but the situation gets slippery when the ice slide starts melting.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes masks and capes for her and Pandy, they become the dollhouse defenders and must save the Gabby Cats from Bad Guy CatRat!

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.sub-title: Lucky And Her New Family Part 1
programme.desc: When El Circo Dos Grillos comes to town, Lucky and Spirit learn circus tricks.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents-her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and The Horrible Hostilities of the Homework Hydra

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: On the hottest week of the year and a miserable time for babies, Boss and Tim infiltrates a country club with a very cool splash pad in order to find some way around their strict no-babies policy.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: An overworked and under loved Precious has to choose between the Templeton Family startup business or Crispin Biscuits' fun playtime. Meanwhile, the company makes its first purchase: upgraded communicators.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous
programme.desc: Ben sets out to rescue Bumpy, but is reluctant to accept the help of the now reformed Kenji. The other kids and Daniel race to find a flash drive containing backup of control chip blueprints.

programme.sub-title: Portrait of Hiccup as a Buff Man

programme.sub-title: The Legends of the Power Gems: Chapter Two
programme.desc: On a quest to find the power gem of fire, Rocky and Bullwinkle travel to Hawaii. They're confronted with another monstrous guardian inside of a volcano in order to retrieve the gem.

programme.title: The Adventures of Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.sub-title: The Legends of the Power Gems: Chapter Three
programme.desc: Rocky and Bullwinkle battle one more guardian to get the final power gem: the wind gem. They're soon confronted by a tiny ninja squirrel who comes from a floating city of squirrels in the sky.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: With their enemies defeated and the volcano erupting on Dragon's Edge, the riders decide to return to Berk, but Hiccup discovers that the Dragon Hunters are still out there.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Marty relishes his role as a producer-cum-organiser of the annual Animal Pride Parade. So when an unusually striped animal arrives, Marty tries to figure out which animal float Odee Eliot belongs on.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Alex lands a role in a big Hollywood movie, but his part is threatened by a diva-like bull. Alex nearly gives up, but with the help of his friends, learns that no one can bully him out of what he loves to do.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag and Scooch learn that Sandra Paws' sleigh broke down on a mountain, they go on an adventure to fix it and save Sniffs-mas! Meanwhile, Beans tries to get a grumpy Frank to feel the Sniffs-mas spirit.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: They decorate the holiday tree but lose the treetop star, so the TZG search for it./ It transpires the house is not scary and belongs to Dr. Greenlittle, and TZG lead her to the big sing-along.

programme.title: TrollsTopia
programme.sub-title: The Farmer and the Hound / Val Serves Murray Duty
programme.desc: Based on the beloved toy property and DreamWorks feature films, Trolls: TrollsTopia! is the next chapter in the Trolls' hair-raising adventures. During the Trolls sequel, Trolls: World Tour, everything gets turned on its hair when Poppy learns there are five other musically themed Trolls tribes scattered throughout the forest. Now, armed with her endless positivity, she decides to bring delegates from the Country Western, Classical, Funk, Techno and Rock tribes to live together in her village, to form a new Trolls City and promote friendship and harmony in a grand experiment she calls TrollsTopia!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a storm blocks Kate from accessing the zoo, Melman decides to become "substitute Kate" and make sure the animals are cared for. His future-paramedic skills are put to the test when the animals go wild in the snow!

programme.title: Dragons Rescue Riders Huttsgalor Holiday
programme.desc: When a series of unpredictable winter storms threaten to ruin Odinyule, the Viking holiday of giving, the Rescue Riders must figure out how to save the holiday.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a snow globe shaped like the dollhouse, she notices the rooms inside are all cattywampus and in the wrong place. A series of wacky misadventures follows.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Game Show Day in the dollhouse! Our wily and well-groomed host, CatRat, leads Gabby and Pandy around the dollhouse, where they compete in Gab-ified games. They win tickets and trade them in for prizes at the end.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a pirate treasure map in the shape of the dollhouse (a piece of it has been torn off). This must mean it's time for a pirate treasure hunt in the dollhouse!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: All aboard the Mermaid Christmas Cruise to help Santa Kitty deliver Christmas presents to our Gabby Cats who live under the sea.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a special plant called an Itty Bitty Blossom that goes from newborn to full-grown in one day. Gabby and Pandy have to take care of the whiny and fussy growing Itty Bitty Blossom.

programme.desc: George and Harold toilet paper the entire school. Forced to flush it all down the toilet, it causes an explosion that turns the French teacher into the TP Mummy.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: Uncle Benji makes a surprise visit to the Templeton Family with a cute baby of his own: Lil Bit Guerrero! Tina gets jealous of Carol doting on Lil Bit.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: A bummed out Tina takes a vacation to the baby resort, Floaties! However, her mind is still back at work, and struggled to actually enjoy her vacation.

programme.desc: With their T-rex down, the kids are at a disadvantage against Daniel in the battle for Mantah Corps Island. Will the kids fend off Daniel, or give in, allowing him to put more dinosaurs under human control?

programme.desc: Dino-nerd Darius and five other campers are chosen for a once-in-a-lifetime experience at Camp Cretaceous. Darius, Kenji and Brooklynn break curfew to sneak into the Compy pen.

programme.desc: George and Harold love Christmas, but they feel like it could use some upgrades. So they make a comic about a new version of the holiday: BLISSMAS. Instead of red bows, laser shows! Instead of ugly sweaters, cool capes! Instead of decorating trees, creating tree-bots! The boys take Melvin's time toad back to convince Santa to incorporate some of their ideas to his new holiday. But they come back to the present to find that their plan didn't work quite how they'd hoped. George and Harold realize they need to help Santa remember the true meaning of Christmas before it's gone forever!

programme.sub-title: Amazamoose and Squirrel Wonder: Chapter One

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Hiccup is summoned to the Northern Markets to look into a curse that causes people to disappear, he is sucked down into a cavern of the fearsome Sandbuster.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Melman loses his first tooth, he fears he won't be Kate's baby anymore and goes on a city-wide chase to recover his tooth before Kate can replace him with a younger, cuter animal.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Ranger Hoof invites Marty on a Junior Ranger night trot in Central Park, Marty is determined to prove he's got what it takes to do the job.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy solve riddles, look for clues, and complete puzzle challenges in order to find puzzle pieces that come together to form a doorway to a special room in the doll house.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby, Pandy, and Carlita attend DJ Catnip's Super Thinker Camp, where they tackle the puzzles and obstacles so they can earn their rainbow capes and become Super Thinkers.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: All the Gabby Cats find unique and creative ways to use the cups, from making gifts to telling stories to playing games. For our Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat shows us how to play a memory game.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy go on a dress-up adventure in the dollhouse, wearing different costumes to help the Gabby Cats get out of some sticky situations.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Every time a rainbow appears, a Kittycorn family gets their special baby Kittycorn! So when Gabby unboxes a baby Kittycorn, all the Gabby Cats help her take care of it. As Pandy and Gabby wait for the rainbow to appear bringing the Kittycorn parents, they enlist the help of Cakey and make rainbow fruit kabobs to feed the hungry Kittycorn. Carlita creates an obstacle course in the playroom to keep the active baby busy and when KittyCorn gets covered in chalk they head to the bathroom where rainbow bubbles are created as they get her cleaned up, mane braided and all, in time to meet her parents. For our Cat of the Day segment, Gabby, Pandy and baby box show us how to make our very own Kittycorn horns!

programme.title: Dragons Rescue Riders: Heroes of the Sky
programme.desc: Showcases the story of twins Dak and Leyla, who were rescued from a shipwreck at a very early age by a kindly mother dragon who raised them alongside her own son, Winger.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: When things don't quite go according to plan, Po and the kids must rally with other allies to save the Empress and protect China.

programme.title: The Croods: Family Tree
programme.desc: When Guy invents a primitive skateboard, Eep and Dawn have a blast trying new tricks. Dawn and the punch monkeys enter a skate-off to win back the skate canyon once and for all.

programme.title: The Epic Tales Of Captain Underpants
programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and The Vexing Villainy of the Vile Vimpire

programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and the Terrifying Perilous Misfortune of the T.P. Mummy
programme.desc: George and Harold toilet paper the entire school. Forced to flush it all down the toilet, it causes an explosion that turns the French teacher into the TP Mummy.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: JJ reluctantly lets Tina take over her assistant duties for the day, but a Tina slip-up leads to an outbreak of town adults drinking diluted special formula that makes them all baby-brained.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back In The Crib
programme.desc: Crispin Biscuits frames Boss and Tina's startup company for exploding baby Iggy's favorite stuffed animal, and Tina is forced to the sidelines to avoid any more bad press.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous
programme.desc: With their T-rex down, the kids are at a disadvantage against Daniel in the battle for Mantah Corps Island. Will the kids fend off Daniel, or give in, allowing him to put more dinosaurs under human control?

programme.title: Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous

programme.title: DreamWorks Dragons: Defenders of Berk

programme.title: DreamWorks Dragons: Defenders of Berk

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
